channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Where to find our complete Week 8 coverage
item.description: Weekend highlights include victories by De La Salle, St. Francis, Pittsburg, Menlo-Atherton, Campolindo.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Utes offensive struggles continue in 13-7 loss to TCU
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team hit a new low Saturday night, with an extremely disappointing 13-7 loss to TCU at Rice-Eccles Stadium. The offense managed just one touchdown, while freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson was sacked four times.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 5 Georgia knocks off No. 1 Texas 30-15, with Etienne running for 3 TDs
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Trevor Etienne ran for three touchdowns, the first two set up by cornerback Daylen Everette's takeaways, and fifth-ranked Georgia went on to beat Quinn Ewers and No. 1 Texas 30-15 on Saturday night. Etienne's last score was a 1-yard plunge on fourth down with 12:04 left.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas TD against Georgia 2 plays after interception 1st wiped out by penalty and trash on field
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Georgia coach Kirby Smart was initially careful with his words when asked about Texas fans littering the north end of the field with water bottles and other trash after an interception for the top-ranked Longhorns was initially wiped out by a pass-interference penalty before off
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Peterka, Thompson lead Sabres past Blackhawks 4-2
item.description: JJ Peterka scored his fourth goal in three games and assisted on a goal by Tage Thompson to lead the Buffalo Sabres past the Chicago Blackhawks 4-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Patriots rookie QB Drake Maye floats theory on why NFL fans in UK should support his team
item.description: The rookie QB presented an argument which appeared to be directed at football fans based in the United Kingdom who might be on the fence about which NFL team they should back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gary Woodland with a 65 in Las Vegas is in contention for the first time since brain surgery
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Former U.S. Open champion Gary Woodland finished 54 holes of the wind-delayed Shriners Children's Open knowing he'll have his best chance at winning since brain surgery more than a year ago. Best of all Saturday was being finished.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 22 Illinois beats No. 24 Michigan 21-7 for its first win over the Wolverines since 2009
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Luke Altmyer threw for a touchdown and ran for another, leading No. 22 Illinois to a 21-7 victory over No. 24 Michigan on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steelers add security measures for Trump's attendance at game against Aaron Rodgers' Jets
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers released a statement Saturday announcing new security protocols and warning fans about potential delays with Trump planning to attend Sunday's game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Djokovic tops Nadal before Sinner beats Alcaraz for the title at the Six Kings Slam exhibition
item.description: RIYADH, Saudi Arabia (AP) — Jannik Sinner beat Carlos Alcaraz 6-7 (5), 6-3, 6-3 for the championship in the Six Kings Slam exhibition Saturday after Novak Djokovic topped Rafael Nadal 6-2, 7-6 (5) in the third-place match.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WNBA Finals reach decisive Game 5 for first time since 2019 as Liberty and Lynx head to New York
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — It's fitting that a record-breaking season for the WNBA would come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 of its Finals. For the first time since 2019, the league championship will go the distance. This one will be in New York on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cleveland closer Clase stumbles again as Yankees score 2 runs in ninth off All-Star in 8-6 ALCS win
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Unchallenged. Unshakeable. Unhittable for six months, Emmanuel Clase hasn't been close to being the same closer in October. The Guardians haven't been able to count on him when it matters most.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lynx force Game 5 of WNBA Finals on Carleton's free throws to beat Liberty 82-80
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — With their season on the line, the Minnesota Lynx did just enough to stave off elimination and force a decisive Game 5 of the WNBA Finals. Bridget Carleton made two free throws with 2 seconds left, and the Lynx beat the New York Liberty 82-80 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Pendrith avoids biggest wind and stays in front in Las Vegas with a long day ahead
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Taylor Pendrith was spared wind so strong it caused a four-hour delay and battered the field Friday in the Shriners Hospital Open. The Canadian only had to play six holes and stayed in the lead before the second round was halted by darkness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Temptations serenade Mets fans at NLCS as founder admits he roots for Dodgers
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Otis Williams had a confession. Asked whether he was a baseball fan, the 82-year-old founder of The Temptations coughed and said in a low, sing-song voice: “Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer, and the New York Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former NFL quarterback Jay Cutler arrested on DUI, gun charges
item.description: The former Bears and Broncos quarterback Jwas arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, Fox 5

item.title: Kucherov scores with 55 seconds left for 4-3 win over Vegas
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored the winning goal with less than a minute to play just 1:27 after Brandon Hagel had tied it and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Vegas Golden Knights 4-3 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: The domed ballpark would have a 373,000-square-foot footprint and is expected to reach a height of 320 feet.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, NewsNation

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: Las Vegas Strip stadium, resort detailed in county documents; new Athletics ballpark revealed
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, ABC 4

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Sockers release 2024-2025 season tickets and schedule
item.description: Season tickets and the full season schedule for the San Diego Sockers' 2024-2025 season are now available for fans to purchase.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson likely down 4-6 months with broken leg, Lions coach Dan Campbell says
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Aidan Hutchinson is likely done playing this year because of the leg injury he sustained against the Cowboys, but surgery to repair his fractured tibia and fibula “went great” and Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he isn't ready to declare his star pass rusher out for the
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jerry West becomes first three-time inductee as Carter and Billups enter basketball's Hall of Fame
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Mass. (AP) — The stage was filled with Laker greats when Jerry West made history Sunday night by becoming the first three-time inductee to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5
